title: Migrate Rust SCHC fragmentation
description: Align lichen-schc fragmentation sender/receiver and ACK wire format with the approved profile and shared vectors; remove private bitmap-length and unlimited-window behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Rust shared-vector, unit, fmt, and strict Clippy gates pass with no unsafe code.
close_reason: Completed in e54f5320a: replaced legacy Rust fragmentation with no_std fixed-profile codecs, canonical ACK/controls, bounded sender and caller-buffer receiver state, retries/aborts/reuse, production shared-vector conformance, SHA-256 oracle checks, and updated fuzz target. Validation: 29 no-default lib tests; 42 full std tests; focused 10 sender/receiver plus shared vector pass; no_std check; changed-file Rust 2021 fmt; scoped strict Clippy; git diff --check; three final independent reviews clean. Broad strict Clippy remains blocked only by inherited untouched context.rs, headers.rs, and shared_vectors.rs warnings; cargo-fuzz unavailable/workspace-excluded.
